allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} events'\); [print\(f'  {e[\\"event\\"]} \({e[\\"timestamp\\"]}\)'\) for e in d[:10]]")
